servinfo.title: Rear Window Regulator Assembly Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Rear Window Regulator Assembly Removal and Installation

attention2.ptxt: Check with connectors disconnected from power window motor.

s1.ptxt: Connect battery positive terminal to terminal “2” and connect battery negative terminal to terminal “1”. (UP operation)
Connect battery positive terminal to terminal “1” and connect battery negative terminal to terminal “2”. (DOWN operation)

servinfo.ptxt: If operation is not smooth, check glass run, door outer weather-strip, door inner weather-strip and grease in link. If those parts are in good condition, replace window regulator assembly.
